name: openclaw
description: OpenClaw - Personal AI Assistant WhatsApp Bot powered by Claude

scripts.test: rm -rf dist-test && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && ln -sf ../souls dist-test/souls && ln -sf ../workspace dist-test/workspace && ln -sf ../.env dist-test/.env && node --require ./dist-test/tests/setup.js --test --test-concurrency=1 dist-test/tests/*.test.js
scripts.benchmark: rm -rf dist-test && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && ln -sf ../souls dist-test/souls && ln -sf ../workspace dist-test/workspace && ln -sf ../.env dist-test/.env && node dist-test/tests/benchmark/run-benchmarks.js
scripts.verify: npm run build && node -e "require('./dist/index.js')" && echo 'entrypoint OK'
